state.coderResponse:
All validation gates pass and all success criteria are met. Summary of verification:

**Files created** (only `internal/git/` — the other untracked items are pre-existing PRP/research artifacts, not my changes):
- `internal/git/git.go` — NEW `package git`, owns the single `// Package git` doc; stdlib-only imports (`bytes`, `errors`, `fmt`, `os/exec`, `strings`); no go-git.
- `internal/git/git_test.go` — white-box `package git`, stdlib `testing`, drives the **real** git binary (2.54.0).

**Validation gates (all pass):**
- Level 1 — `go build ./internal/git/` ✅
- Level 2 — `go vet ./internal/git/` ✅ clean
- Level 3 — `test -z "$(gofmt -l internal/git/)"` ✅ empty
- Level 4 — `go test ./internal/git/` ✅ (5/5 pass: `TestNew_ResolvesGit`, `TestNew_MissingBinary`, `TestRun_Version`, `TestRun_RevParseGitDirInRepo`, `TestRun_NonRepoIsExitError`)
- Level 5 — `go test ./...` ✅ whole-module green (`internal/git`, `internal/provider`, `internal/ui`)

**Scope boundaries respected:** go.mod/go.sum unchanged (no git library), `// Package git` appears exactly once (in git.go), main.go/Makefile/internal/ui/internal/provider untouched, no README/docs/providers TOML created, no `go mod tidy`. Mode A docs satisfied — godoc on `Git`/`New`/`run`/`ExitError` cite PRD §22.3 (shell out, no go-git), §19 (no `sh -c`), and decisions.md §2.

```json
{
   "result": "success",
   "message": "Implemented P1_M3_T1_S1: created internal/git/git.go (new package git) and internal/git/git_test.go. git.go defines the Git struct (unexported dir+git fields), New(dir) constructor resolving git via exec.LookPath (fail-fast), the unexported run(args...) exec helper (exec.Command(g.git, args...) — never sh -c, captures stdout+stderr into buffers, cmd.Env/Stdin left nil, returns typed *ExitError{Args,Code,Stderr} on non-zero exit via errors.As into *exec.ExitError reading Code from ee.ExitCode() and Stderr from our own buffer; wrapped generic error on start failure; raw stdout on success), and the exported ExitError type with its Error() method. git_test.go is white-box (package git), stdlib testing only, and passes against the real git binary (2.54.0): version contains 'git version', rev-parse --git-dir in an init'd temp dir returns '.git', rev-parse in a non-repo temp dir returns a *ExitError (errors.As) with Code 128 and Stderr containing 'not a git repository' with Args preserved, plus the New error branch via empty PATH. All five validation gates pass: go build/vet clean, gofmt -l empty, go test ./internal/git/ green (5/5), go test ./... whole-module green. Only stdlib imports; go.mod/go.sum unchanged; // Package git doc appears exactly once; no other files touched."
}
```
